status.description: Forge lifecycle status: idea (unfulfilled request), in-progress (being built), submitted (built by forge). Absent for regular catalog entries.

complexity.description: Estimated build complexity for forge ideas

capability.description: Core capability this tool demonstrates (for forge entries)

approach.description: Technical approach for building this tool (for forge entries)

projectPath.description: Local path to the forge project directory

agentArchitecture.description: Agent system used to build this tool

validation.description: Evidence that the tool does what it claims (for entries built from unfilled slots)

triage.description: Forge triage scores. Required for ideas — the forge uses these to decide what to build next.

impact.description: How helpful this tool would be to users

buildability.description: How feasible it is for AI agents to build

alternatives.description: Whether existing tools already fill this need: none = gap in the market, partial = tools exist but miss something important, covered = good tools already exist

alternatives_note.description: Which existing tools cover this need and what gaps remain
